## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Dam;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Dam { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
electricity, energy, water

## Categories
buildings, sustainability, navigation

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/dam)
